{"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-834", "name": "Excessive Iteration"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to long runtimes. This requires cross-reference streams with wrong large `/Size` values or object streams with wrong large `/N` values.

### Patches

This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.10.1](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.10.1).

### Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3733](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3733).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00297, "percentile": 0.21524}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-15T19:43:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41168"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T21:17:09Z", "published_at": "2026-04-15T19:43:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3733", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.10.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41168", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/commit/62338e9d36419cf193ccec7331784f45df1d70b3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf has long runtimes for wrong size values in cross-reference and object streams", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:51:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj6c-8h6c-hppx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.10.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.10.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf has long runtimes for wrong size values in cross-reference and object streams
